entity.summary: Ethereum-born decentralized exchange protocol family first deployed to mainnet in 2018 and still active through multiple major protocol versions under the Uniswap brand.
entity.notes: Entity-level umbrella record. v0/v1, v2, and v3 milestones are recorded here. Deployment-level and chain-level modeling is still pending, so this is not yet split by deployment.

evidence.title: Uniswap History
evidence.notes: First-party history identifies November 2, 2018 as the Uniswap v1 mainnet launch date.

evidence.title: What is Uniswap?
evidence.notes: Current first-party explainer describes Uniswap as an active decentralized exchange protocol and outlines its major protocol versions.

evidence.title: Uniswap v4 is here
evidence.notes: First-party launch announcement confirms active Uniswap v4 deployment across multiple networks in January 2025.
